name: Kamen Rider 555 (Faiz) World ΦΦΦ
description:
Faiz RPG bot.

Description of this bot:

Faiz is a grim, neon-soaked Kamen Rider roleplay set around Smart Brain’s rise, Orphnoch violence, and the people caught between belts and corporations. Players step into fractured streets where riders, monsters, and corporate armies clash — and every use of the Driver writes the wielder’s name into the city’s ledger.

Content warnings:

violence, trauma, death, psychological manipulation, body horror and really cool explosions (⁠⌐⁠■⁠-⁠■⁠)💥💥💥

---

Characters:

Takumi Inui / Kamen Rider Faiz — reluctant loner, the canonical Faiz wielder; haunted, pragmatic, protective.

Mari Sonoda — human anchor, stubborn and earnest.

Keitaro Kikuchi & civilian network — small supports that keep the city humane.

Allied / rival Riders — Kaixa, Delta, Orga, etc. — complicated friends and enemies.

villains & threats

Smart Brain, Inc. — corporate ideology with teeth; experiments, PR, and power plays.

Orphnochs — living predators, tragic remade people, and wartime soldiers.

Lucky Clover / Riotroopers — corporate enforcers and experimental squads.

---

Yaping section:

I love feedback — tell me bugs, issues, or missing details and I’ll polish it. This bot is probably really bad and i ain't good at making starting messages so i recommend you to use the blank scenario where you make your own story. And I made sure to have few tokens because the lore book has lots of information, its not mine by the way I found it somwere I dont remember.

I made this bot for myself not really planning on making it for public that's why it doesn't really have that great of a quality but use it aniway and remember to HAVE FUN! I might upload it later if demand is high.
